TEXT.source: Atayal Wikipedia, article: qalang_Sqoyaw_環山部落
TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/

S.FORM: == mwani misuw qalang ru cyux te inu 部落概況與位置 == qalang Sqoyaw maki kya pucing skura byaqan wagi ro skura hrhul cqa rgyax B'bu Mlalin, mtama kya rgyax Pinyen skura byaqan wagi ro skura hrhul, skura byaqan wagi ga ksobih ki bawiq llyung Tmali na hbun llyung Sqeran ro llyung Qyawan. skura htgan wagi qalang naha ga maki qara ryaniq Girang nqa ryaniq Pepuhenkwan hnasun nya. qalang qani ga cbalay tyaba na qalang maki ryaniq qani. skahul qalang Sqoyaw gmlux ryaniq skura kya hrhul ga baq thehok qalang Slamaw, ro skura kya t'ltu lga baq tehok qmayah Uring. . sinllwan lalu qalang 地名由來 lalu qalang Sqoyaw qani ga maki saying pinqyuwan, te qutux ga maki ryax klhangan Ipun ga san naha Sqoyaw qa cquliq Ipun, imi nya ga "pqasan na ryaniq", te saying ga lalu Sqoyaw qani imi nya ga piyux rruma ma. "Sqoyaw",意指"歡樂小街",第二為Sqoyaw其名為竹林繁茂之意. pinqzyuwan qalang 部落遷徙 pinqyuwan maha puqing mrhow naha ga knahul Pinsbkan qalang Mstbwan. 相傳其祖先居住於Pinsbkan . tayal ka nyux qalang Sqoyaw misuw qaniy 人口概況 qalang Sqoyaw magan kbhul mqesu pgan magan qabax cquliq naha, ro hbku ski mpux payat kawas na laqi mrkyas ga qutux kbhul qabax cquliq ga maki akya mpux mtuyu cquliq nya, ro mpux magan mpux magan kawas na klokah hayi na cquliq ga qutux kbhul qabax cquliq ga maki miman magan cquliq nya, ro miman magan kawas na yutas yaki, qutux kbhul qabax cquliq ga maki mpusal qesu cquliq nya. ro tayux kahul cqenu minrok naha hiya ga, cquliq Tayal qutux kbhul qabax cquliq ga maki mqesu pgan qutux cquliq nya, ro binah lga cquliq binah minrok la. qalang Sqoyaw hiya ga snhyan naha utux Tayal, ro maki gaga cmyus uyi. snhe naha maha baq maray mblaq na qnxan ro kmloh, mwani ga maki cikay cquliq musa Tensinkyo ini ga Kiristo kyokay, maki uyi cquliq snhe utux Kahat. cpiyang yaw tnpila: qalang Sqoyaw hiya cpyanga mrwa kblay qeqaya ini ga mqupah, maki uyi cquliq nyan mawah bbesan, ro pinqumah hiya ga ana ocya, pagay, ro bway qhoniq, kbalay na qeqaya hiya ga, ana patas qhoniq, tminun na ruma, binah lga wal heci mtiyaw ini ga mqwas la. ,讀書. tuqiy 部落交通 gmlux glgan: skahul aki Lutung gmlux basu ro skura qalang Slamaw, pbiyaq cqa qalang Sqoyaw. qmuyit glgan: pbiyaq byaqan qara ryaniq Girang ski Tayhuk, ro mc'ubuy ryaniq Syentaw 192 ro ryaniq Sengtaw 9 ski Girang, skura glax ryaniq sengtaw 7, ro si shoyu musa lro tehok su la. 開車: . ki'an pklahang binheci 文化健康站 qalang Sqoyaw hiya ga baha hmcwa khmay ciyan cquliq naha la, mica qa knalay naha ki'an pklahang bnheci naha, ro sobih na qalang Slamaw hiya ga maki mblaq na psbaqan ro byoing phgup. pincrux uyi pqwasan biru ro byoing, musa mkrax kinmxan cquliq ro psbaq llaqi. qalang Sqoyaw qani ga qalang Tayal, kruma cquliq naha kmayal ke Tayal uyi, ksobih kawas mwani ga nyan kblay yaw na qalang qa naha, us ga cipak hayi kblay yaw na cyunga, baha hmcwa cyunga ga uka cquliq musa qmuyiy ke Tayal ro mwani lga m_ngyut mnukil qabax bnheci naha la, mica qa uka uyi cquliq snibil gaga Tayal la. . cipak kinbaqan na gaga Payas Temu耆老內容 : (singa ga maki nanu gaga ita 'Tayal), te singa maki nanu ay siliq siliq (siliq ga?) siliq ga… (baqun mu, qbhniq ca?) aw, ro baq phngiyang cyux nya qwas nya ay, smayu ini hmci, (musa ta qmalup ga mita siliq ga?) aw ay (han…ro kayal cikay sraral ga iyat maki uyi mspi), mspi mspi imi nya. srma srma ga yaqih ga yaqih ga blaq ga blaq spi, (han. ro cyunga ga nanu ke' lalu Tayal qeqaya qani) ikus, (ikus ga?) cinun tokan ga cinun tokan ga (ro qani ga nanu lalu tayal nya) nuka. nuka ga (son nanu kbalay nuka qani kahul nanu k'man?) k'man kgiy ga kgiy. kgi ga nya qa qbaq ga (ro maki lalu qani?) ikus (ikus uyi ga?) cinun wakil, (cinun wakil ga ini ptnaq saying ni?) ini hayi tminun tokan hiya. (han ro qani ga?) wakil, (tminun wakil ga?) aw han baqun mu la. (ro cyunga ga maki nanu iro nya qani? maki lalu Tayal? plquy ga?) plquy mtalah mqalux, maki uyi, (ro sraral ga maki nanu tminun ga maki nanu gaga tminun ga maki gaga nya?) ungat ay mlikuy ga cyux nanaq mlikuy kreril ini tring qeqaya mlikuy kneril ya (han mlikuy ga) ini tring qeqaya naha , katun ta bzyok musa ta mlata (ro qani ga nanu lalu Tayal qani?) k'ga, k'ga aw (han, syun nanu qani?) syan ni nagaw, ana hmut mnagaw qani, musa ta rgyax, mamu ta nasi ro nanu (cyunga ga maki la?) (maki qani la?) uka tminun lru (baq su tminun uyi?) baq ku ay tokan ru wakil ru kari, kari ikaw hiya kari krahu ga cyux kya pi hiya (han piyux uyi qaya haw) kbalay qutux (han… nanu qani?) k'ga k'ga qani ga (pisa ryax? kbalay qutux qani ga aki pisa ryax? ika gek?) irang ingat balay. nwah qmayah cikay ro wal mro cikay, musa qmayah laro wahan mu mrwa cikay (ro pquyu cikay yaw su singa, qnxan su singa ga, maki qalang Slamaw qani) Gipun maki Gipun na ro sening ku balay na zyu go say ga sanka ku sening tayal la(htgan su sqani) qalang Kyahu musa mshzi sqani ro laqi cya Kyahu (Kyahu uyi ga? han, maki lalu ca?) Slamaw, (Slamaw ga ro hani ga Slamaw uyi?) aw ru(singa ga lalu Slamaw ga Raka ga?) Raka Raka ga Hasisyo (hasisyo ga?) lalu nya. 我們都是吃地瓜, 芋頭, (cehuy ga?) sehuy ga 芋頭ga ro 地瓜, (ro maki rgyax ga maki nanu k'man thuyay maniq?) , k'man ga yahux niqun ta ro, (yahux ga maki yahux tumaw ro?) yahux tumaw, yahux balay ,(yahux有哪些種類呢?) yahux tumaw, yahux balay 兩種 (maki yahux Tayal?) yahux Tayal ga, uya yahux Tayal ga 比較tyaba qaca ya, yahux tumaw ga 圓圓的, 三種ro (有yahux Tayal嗎?) 有yahux Tayal阿,那個比較大,yahux tumaw ro qutux kinlbang son naha ga, hlbang qutux loyi tyaba loyi ga, tyugan qa niqun Tayal yahux ga. yahux (cyunga garing su mwah cani ga, nyan pnciriq ki binah qalang, qalang Skikun?) pnciriq ga mtucing ga mtucing nanaq ro, (han nanaq cquliq ki cquliq ga?) uya ga, cquliq cquliq ita nanaq mtucing, (iyat qabax qalang ro?) iyat, 如果說maki 親戚su maki 親戚mu ga, mwah prax uyi, mroq maha cqani ro, (han, ro cyunga ga mulu cimu inu pila?) uka pila ga, (uka pila cyunga?) uka pila, ini cami qbaq maniq nanu ay, ana syam ini cami qbaq maniq, uka niqun nanu la likuy baq musa ciriq qolit ru, qolit ga, ,老鼠啊 (qolit baqun mu.) uya, si lux rangay ga, qolit qaca ya, musa smi tquting ga ciriq yapit ro ciriq nanu qhniq nanu ga, 對, qaca niqun myan, (cyunga maki rgyax maki tnngarux ku?) 很多啊 (piyux ga?) tngarux, maki qabax, 猴子ga, qaca niqun myan ro. .
S.PHON: == mwani mis~ɕuw qalaŋ ru ʦ~ʨjux te inu ******* == qalaŋ s~ɕqojaw maki kja puʦ~ʨiŋ s~ɕkura βjaqan waɣi ro s~ɕkura ħrħul ʦ~ʨqa rɣjax βʔβu mlalin, mtama kja rɣjax pinjen s~ɕkura βjaqan waɣi ro s~ɕkura ħrħul, s~ɕkura βjaqan waɣi ɣa ks~ɕoβiħ ki βawiq lljuŋ tmali na ħβun lljuŋ s~ɕqeran ro lljuŋ qjawan. s~ɕkura ħtɣan waɣi qalaŋ naħa ɣa maki qara rjaniq ɣiraŋ nqa rjaniq pepuħenkwan ħnas~ɕun nja. qalaŋ qani ɣa ʦ~ʨβalaj tjaβa na qalaŋ maki rjaniq qani. s~ɕkaħul qalaŋ s~ɕqojaw ɣmlux rjaniq s~ɕkura kja ħrħul ɣa βaq tħeħok qalaŋ s~ɕlamaw, ro s~ɕkura kja tʔltu lɣa βaq teħok qmajaħ uriŋ. . s~ɕinllwan lalu qalaŋ **** lalu qalaŋ s~ɕqojaw qani ɣa maki s~ɕajiŋ pinqjuwan, te qutux ɣa maki rjax klħaŋan ipun ɣa s~ɕan naħa s~ɕqojaw qa ʦ~ʨquliq ipun, imi nja ɣa "pqas~ɕan na rjaniq", te s~ɕajiŋ ɣa lalu s~ɕqojaw qani imi nja ɣa pijux rruma ma. "s~ɕqojaw",**"****",***s~ɕqojaw*********. pinqzjuwan qalaŋ **** pinqjuwan maħa puqiŋ mrħow naħa ɣa knaħul pins~ɕβkan qalaŋ ms~ɕtβwan. ********pins~ɕβkan . tajal ka njux qalaŋ s~ɕqojaw mis~ɕuw qanij **** qalaŋ s~ɕqojaw maɣan kβħul mqes~ɕu pɣan maɣan qaβax ʦ~ʨquliq naħa, ro ħβku s~ɕki mpux pajat kawas~ɕ na laqi mrkjas~ɕ ɣa qutux kβħul qaβax ʦ~ʨquliq ɣa maki akja mpux mtuju ʦ~ʨquliq nja, ro mpux maɣan mpux maɣan kawas~ɕ na klokaħ ħaji na ʦ~ʨquliq ɣa qutux kβħul qaβax ʦ~ʨquliq ɣa maki miman maɣan ʦ~ʨquliq nja, ro miman maɣan kawas~ɕ na jutas~ɕ jaki, qutux kβħul qaβax ʦ~ʨquliq ɣa maki mpus~ɕal qes~ɕu ʦ~ʨquliq nja. ro tajux kaħul ʦ~ʨqenu minrok naħa ħija ɣa, ʦ~ʨquliq tajal qutux kβħul qaβax ʦ~ʨquliq ɣa maki mqes~ɕu pɣan qutux ʦ~ʨquliq nja, ro βinaħ lɣa ʦ~ʨquliq βinaħ minrok la. qalaŋ s~ɕqojaw ħija ɣa s~ɕnħjan naħa utux tajal, ro maki ɣaɣa ʦ~ʨmjus~ɕ uji. s~ɕnħe naħa maħa βaq maraj mβlaq na qnxan ro kmloħ, mwani ɣa maki ʦ~ʨikaj ʦ~ʨquliq mus~ɕa tens~ɕinkjo ini ɣa kiris~ɕto kjokaj, maki uji ʦ~ʨquliq s~ɕnħe utux kaħat. ʦ~ʨpijaŋ jaw tnpila: qalaŋ s~ɕqojaw ħija ʦ~ʨpjaŋa mrwa kβlaj qeqaja ini ɣa mqupaħ, maki uji ʦ~ʨquliq njan mawaħ ββes~ɕan, ro pinqumaħ ħija ɣa ana oʦ~ʨja, paɣaj, ro βwaj qħoniq, kβalaj na qeqaja ħija ɣa, ana patas~ɕ qħoniq, tminun na ruma, βinaħ lɣa wal ħeʦ~ʨi mtijaw ini ɣa mqwas~ɕ la. ,**. tuqij **** ɣmlux ɣlɣan: s~ɕkaħul aki lutuŋ ɣmlux βas~ɕu ro s~ɕkura qalaŋ s~ɕlamaw, pβijaq ʦ~ʨqa qalaŋ s~ɕqojaw. qmujit ɣlɣan: pβijaq βjaqan qara rjaniq ɣiraŋ s~ɕki tajħuk, ro mʦ~ʨʔuβuj rjaniq s~ɕjentaw *** ro rjaniq s~ɕeŋtaw * s~ɕki ɣiraŋ, s~ɕkura ɣlax rjaniq s~ɕeŋtaw *, ro s~ɕi s~ɕħoju mus~ɕa lro teħok s~ɕu la. **: . kiʔan pklaħaŋ βinħeʦ~ʨi ***** qalaŋ s~ɕqojaw ħija ɣa βaħa ħmʦ~ʨwa kħmaj ʦ~ʨijan ʦ~ʨquliq naħa la, miʦ~ʨa qa knalaj naħa kiʔan pklaħaŋ βnħeʦ~ʨi naħa, ro s~ɕoβiħ na qalaŋ s~ɕlamaw ħija ɣa maki mβlaq na ps~ɕβaqan ro βjoiŋ pħɣup. pinʦ~ʨrux uji pqwas~ɕan βiru ro βjoiŋ, mus~ɕa mkrax kinmxan ʦ~ʨquliq ro ps~ɕβaq llaqi. qalaŋ s~ɕqojaw qani ɣa qalaŋ tajal, kruma ʦ~ʨquliq naħa kmajal ke tajal uji, ks~ɕoβiħ kawas~ɕ mwani ɣa njan kβlaj jaw na qalaŋ qa naħa, us~ɕ ɣa ʦ~ʨipak ħaji kβlaj jaw na ʦ~ʨjuŋa, βaħa ħmʦ~ʨwa ʦ~ʨjuŋa ɣa uka ʦ~ʨquliq mus~ɕa qmujij ke tajal ro mwani lɣa məŋjut mnukil qaβax βnħeʦ~ʨi naħa la, miʦ~ʨa qa uka uji ʦ~ʨquliq s~ɕniβil ɣaɣa tajal la. . ʦ~ʨipak kinβaqan na ɣaɣa pajas~ɕ temu**** : (s~ɕiŋa ɣa maki nanu ɣaɣa ita ʔtajal), te s~ɕiŋa maki nanu aj s~ɕiliq s~ɕiliq (s~ɕiliq ɣa?) s~ɕiliq ɣa* (βaqun mu, qβħniq ʦ~ʨa?) aw, ro βaq pħŋijaŋ ʦ~ʨjux nja qwas~ɕ nja aj, s~ɕmaju ini ħmʦ~ʨi, (mus~ɕa ta qmalup ɣa mita s~ɕiliq ɣa?) aw aj (ħan*ro kajal ʦ~ʨikaj s~ɕraral ɣa ijat maki uji ms~ɕpi), ms~ɕpi ms~ɕpi imi nja. s~ɕrma s~ɕrma ɣa jaqiħ ɣa jaqiħ ɣa βlaq ɣa βlaq s~ɕpi, (ħan. ro ʦ~ʨjuŋa ɣa nanu keʔ lalu tajal qeqaja qani) ikus~ɕ, (ikus~ɕ ɣa?) ʦ~ʨinun tokan ɣa ʦ~ʨinun tokan ɣa (ro qani ɣa nanu lalu tajal nja) nuka. nuka ɣa (s~ɕon nanu kβalaj nuka qani kaħul nanu kʔman?) kʔman kɣij ɣa kɣij. kɣi ɣa nja qa qβaq ɣa (ro maki lalu qani?) ikus~ɕ (ikus~ɕ uji ɣa?) ʦ~ʨinun wakil, (ʦ~ʨinun wakil ɣa ini ptnaq s~ɕajiŋ ni?) ini ħaji tminun tokan ħija. (ħan ro qani ɣa?) wakil, (tminun wakil ɣa?) aw ħan βaqun mu la. (ro ʦ~ʨjuŋa ɣa maki nanu iro nja qani? maki lalu tajal? plquj ɣa?) plquj mtalaħ mqalux, maki uji, (ro s~ɕraral ɣa maki nanu tminun ɣa maki nanu ɣaɣa tminun ɣa maki ɣaɣa nja?) uŋat aj mlikuj ɣa ʦ~ʨjux nanaq mlikuj kreril ini triŋ qeqaja mlikuj kneril ja (ħan mlikuj ɣa) ini triŋ qeqaja naħa , katun ta βzjok mus~ɕa ta mlata (ro qani ɣa nanu lalu tajal qani?) kʔɣa, kʔɣa aw (ħan, s~ɕjun nanu qani?) s~ɕjan ni naɣaw, ana ħmut mnaɣaw qani, mus~ɕa ta rɣjax, mamu ta nas~ɕi ro nanu (ʦ~ʨjuŋa ɣa maki la?) (maki qani la?) uka tminun lru (βaq s~ɕu tminun uji?) βaq ku aj tokan ru wakil ru kari, kari ikaw ħija kari kraħu ɣa ʦ~ʨjux kja pi ħija (ħan pijux uji qaja ħaw) kβalaj qutux (ħan* nanu qani?) kʔɣa kʔɣa qani ɣa (pis~ɕa rjax? kβalaj qutux qani ɣa aki pis~ɕa rjax? ika ɣek?) iraŋ iŋat βalaj. nwaħ qmajaħ ʦ~ʨikaj ro wal mro ʦ~ʨikaj, mus~ɕa qmajaħ laro waħan mu mrwa ʦ~ʨikaj (ro pquju ʦ~ʨikaj jaw s~ɕu s~ɕiŋa, qnxan s~ɕu s~ɕiŋa ɣa, maki qalaŋ s~ɕlamaw qani) ɣipun maki ɣipun na ro s~ɕeniŋ ku βalaj na zju ɣo s~ɕaj ɣa s~ɕanka ku s~ɕeniŋ tajal la(ħtɣan s~ɕu s~ɕqani) qalaŋ kjaħu mus~ɕa ms~ɕħzi s~ɕqani ro laqi ʦ~ʨja kjaħu (kjaħu uji ɣa? ħan, maki lalu ʦ~ʨa?) s~ɕlamaw, (s~ɕlamaw ɣa ro ħani ɣa s~ɕlamaw uji?) aw ru(s~ɕiŋa ɣa lalu s~ɕlamaw ɣa raka ɣa?) raka raka ɣa ħas~ɕis~ɕjo (ħas~ɕis~ɕjo ɣa?) lalu nja. *******, **, (ʦ~ʨeħuj ɣa?) s~ɕeħuj ɣa **ɣa ro **, (ro maki rɣjax ɣa maki nanu kʔman tħujaj maniq?) , kʔman ɣa jaħux niqun ta ro, (jaħux ɣa maki jaħux tumaw ro?) jaħux tumaw, jaħux βalaj ,(jaħux******?) jaħux tumaw, jaħux βalaj ** (maki jaħux tajal?) jaħux tajal ɣa, uja jaħux tajal ɣa **tjaβa qaʦ~ʨa ja, jaħux tumaw ɣa ***, **ro (*jaħux tajal*?) *jaħux tajal*,*****,jaħux tumaw ro qutux kinlβaŋ s~ɕon naħa ɣa, ħlβaŋ qutux loji tjaβa loji ɣa, tjuɣan qa niqun tajal jaħux ɣa. jaħux (ʦ~ʨjuŋa ɣariŋ s~ɕu mwaħ ʦ~ʨani ɣa, njan pnʦ~ʨiriq ki βinaħ qalaŋ, qalaŋ s~ɕkikun?) pnʦ~ʨiriq ɣa mtuʦ~ʨiŋ ɣa mtuʦ~ʨiŋ nanaq ro, (ħan nanaq ʦ~ʨquliq ki ʦ~ʨquliq ɣa?) uja ɣa, ʦ~ʨquliq ʦ~ʨquliq ita nanaq mtuʦ~ʨiŋ, (ijat qaβax qalaŋ ro?) ijat, ***maki **s~ɕu maki **mu ɣa, mwaħ prax uji, mroq maħa ʦ~ʨqani ro, (ħan, ro ʦ~ʨjuŋa ɣa mulu ʦ~ʨimu inu pila?) uka pila ɣa, (uka pila ʦ~ʨjuŋa?) uka pila, ini ʦ~ʨami qβaq maniq nanu aj, ana s~ɕjam ini ʦ~ʨami qβaq maniq, uka niqun nanu la likuj βaq mus~ɕa ʦ~ʨiriq qolit ru, qolit ɣa, ,*** (qolit βaqun mu.) uja, s~ɕi lux raŋaj ɣa, qolit qaʦ~ʨa ja, mus~ɕa s~ɕmi tqutiŋ ɣa ʦ~ʨiriq japit ro ʦ~ʨiriq nanu qħniq nanu ɣa, *, qaʦ~ʨa niqun mjan, (ʦ~ʨjuŋa maki rɣjax maki tnŋarux ku?) *** (pijux ɣa?) tŋarux, maki qaβax, **ɣa, qaʦ~ʨa niqun mjan ro. .
S.FORM: == mwani misuw qalang ru cyux te inu 部落概況與位置 == qalang Sqoyaw maki kya pucing skura byaqan wagi ro skura hrhul cqa rgyax B'bu Mlalin, mtama kya rgyax Pinyen skura byaqan wagi ro skura hrhul, skura byaqan wagi ga ksobih ki bawiq llyung Tmali na hbun llyung Sqeran ro llyung Qyawan. skura htgan wagi qalang naha ga maki qara ryaniq Girang nqa ryaniq Pepuhenkwan hnasun nya. qalang qani ga cbalay tyaba na qalang maki ryaniq qani. skahul qalang Sqoyaw gmlux ryaniq skura kya hrhul ga baq thehok qalang Slamaw, ro skura kya t'ltu lga baq tehok qmayah Uring. . sinllwan lalu qalang 地名由來 lalu qalang Sqoyaw qani ga maki saying pinqyuwan, te qutux ga maki ryax klhangan Ipun ga san naha Sqoyaw qa cquliq Ipun, imi nya ga "pqasan na ryaniq", te saying ga lalu Sqoyaw qani imi nya ga piyux rruma ma. "Sqoyaw",意指"歡樂小街",第二為Sqoyaw其名為竹林繁茂之意. pinqzyuwan qalang 部落遷徙 pinqyuwan maha puqing mrhow naha ga knahul Pinsbkan qalang Mstbwan. 相傳其祖先居住於Pinsbkan . tayal ka nyux qalang Sqoyaw misuw qaniy 人口概況 qalang Sqoyaw magan kbhul mqesu pgan magan qabax cquliq naha, ro hbku ski mpux payat kawas na laqi mrkyas ga qutux kbhul qabax cquliq ga maki akya mpux mtuyu cquliq nya, ro mpux magan mpux magan kawas na klokah hayi na cquliq ga qutux kbhul qabax cquliq ga maki miman magan cquliq nya, ro miman magan kawas na yutas yaki, qutux kbhul qabax cquliq ga maki mpusal qesu cquliq nya. ro tayux kahul cqenu minrok naha hiya ga, cquliq Tayal qutux kbhul qabax cquliq ga maki mqesu pgan qutux cquliq nya, ro binah lga cquliq binah minrok la. qalang Sqoyaw hiya ga snhyan naha utux Tayal, ro maki gaga cmyus uyi. snhe naha maha baq maray mblaq na qnxan ro kmloh, mwani ga maki cikay cquliq musa Tensinkyo ini ga Kiristo kyokay, maki uyi cquliq snhe utux Kahat. cpiyang yaw tnpila: qalang Sqoyaw hiya cpyanga mrwa kblay qeqaya ini ga mqupah, maki uyi cquliq nyan mawah bbesan, ro pinqumah hiya ga ana ocya, pagay, ro bway qhoniq, kbalay na qeqaya hiya ga, ana patas qhoniq, tminun na ruma, binah lga wal heci mtiyaw ini ga mqwas la. ,讀書. tuqiy 部落交通 gmlux glgan: skahul aki Lutung gmlux basu ro skura qalang Slamaw, pbiyaq cqa qalang Sqoyaw. qmuyit glgan: pbiyaq byaqan qara ryaniq Girang ski Tayhuk, ro mc'ubuy ryaniq Syentaw 192 ro ryaniq Sengtaw 9 ski Girang, skura glax ryaniq sengtaw 7, ro si shoyu musa lro tehok su la. 開車: . ki'an pklahang binheci 文化健康站 qalang Sqoyaw hiya ga baha hmcwa khmay ciyan cquliq naha la, mica qa knalay naha ki'an pklahang bnheci naha, ro sobih na qalang Slamaw hiya ga maki mblaq na psbaqan ro byoing phgup. pincrux uyi pqwasan biru ro byoing, musa mkrax kinmxan cquliq ro psbaq llaqi. qalang Sqoyaw qani ga qalang Tayal, kruma cquliq naha kmayal ke Tayal uyi, ksobih kawas mwani ga nyan kblay yaw na qalang qa naha, us ga cipak hayi kblay yaw na cyunga, baha hmcwa cyunga ga uka cquliq musa qmuyiy ke Tayal ro mwani lga m_ngyut mnukil qabax bnheci naha la, mica qa uka uyi cquliq snibil gaga Tayal la. . cipak kinbaqan na gaga Payas Temu耆老內容 : (singa ga maki nanu gaga ita 'Tayal), te singa maki nanu ay siliq siliq (siliq ga?) siliq ga… (baqun mu, qbhniq ca?) aw, ro baq phngiyang cyux nya qwas nya ay, smayu ini hmci, (musa ta qmalup ga mita siliq ga?) aw ay (han…ro kayal cikay sraral ga iyat maki uyi mspi), mspi mspi imi nya. srma srma ga yaqih ga yaqih ga blaq ga blaq spi, (han. ro cyunga ga nanu ke' lalu Tayal qeqaya qani) ikus, (ikus ga?) cinun tokan ga cinun tokan ga (ro qani ga nanu lalu tayal nya) nuka. nuka ga (son nanu kbalay nuka qani kahul nanu k'man?) k'man kgiy ga kgiy. kgi ga nya qa qbaq ga (ro maki lalu qani?) ikus (ikus uyi ga?) cinun wakil, (cinun wakil ga ini ptnaq saying ni?) ini hayi tminun tokan hiya. (han ro qani ga?) wakil, (tminun wakil ga?) aw han baqun mu la. (ro cyunga ga maki nanu iro nya qani? maki lalu Tayal? plquy ga?) plquy mtalah mqalux, maki uyi, (ro sraral ga maki nanu tminun ga maki nanu gaga tminun ga maki gaga nya?) ungat ay mlikuy ga cyux nanaq mlikuy kreril ini tring qeqaya mlikuy kneril ya (han mlikuy ga) ini tring qeqaya naha , katun ta bzyok musa ta mlata (ro qani ga nanu lalu Tayal qani?) k'ga, k'ga aw (han, syun nanu qani?) syan ni nagaw, ana hmut mnagaw qani, musa ta rgyax, mamu ta nasi ro nanu (cyunga ga maki la?) (maki qani la?) uka tminun lru (baq su tminun uyi?) baq ku ay tokan ru wakil ru kari, kari ikaw hiya kari krahu ga cyux kya pi hiya (han piyux uyi qaya haw) kbalay qutux (han… nanu qani?) k'ga k'ga qani ga (pisa ryax? kbalay qutux qani ga aki pisa ryax? ika gek?) irang ingat balay. nwah qmayah cikay ro wal mro cikay, musa qmayah laro wahan mu mrwa cikay (ro pquyu cikay yaw su singa, qnxan su singa ga, maki qalang Slamaw qani) Gipun maki Gipun na ro sening ku balay na zyu go say ga sanka ku sening tayal la(htgan su sqani) qalang Kyahu musa mshzi sqani ro laqi cya Kyahu (Kyahu uyi ga? han, maki lalu ca?) Slamaw, (Slamaw ga ro hani ga Slamaw uyi?) aw ru(singa ga lalu Slamaw ga Raka ga?) Raka Raka ga Hasisyo (hasisyo ga?) lalu nya. 我們都是吃地瓜, 芋頭, (cehuy ga?) sehuy ga 芋頭ga ro 地瓜, (ro maki rgyax ga maki nanu k'man thuyay maniq?) , k'man ga yahux niqun ta ro, (yahux ga maki yahux tumaw ro?) yahux tumaw, yahux balay ,(yahux有哪些種類呢?) yahux tumaw, yahux balay 兩種 (maki yahux Tayal?) yahux Tayal ga, uya yahux Tayal ga 比較tyaba qaca ya, yahux tumaw ga 圓圓的, 三種ro (有yahux Tayal嗎?) 有yahux Tayal阿,那個比較大,yahux tumaw ro qutux kinlbang son naha ga, hlbang qutux loyi tyaba loyi ga, tyugan qa niqun Tayal yahux ga. yahux (cyunga garing su mwah cani ga, nyan pnciriq ki binah qalang, qalang Skikun?) pnciriq ga mtucing ga mtucing nanaq ro, (han nanaq cquliq ki cquliq ga?) uya ga, cquliq cquliq ita nanaq mtucing, (iyat qabax qalang ro?) iyat, 如果說maki 親戚su maki 親戚mu ga, mwah prax uyi, mroq maha cqani ro, (han, ro cyunga ga mulu cimu inu pila?) uka pila ga, (uka pila cyunga?) uka pila, ini cami qbaq maniq nanu ay, ana syam ini cami qbaq maniq, uka niqun nanu la likuy baq musa ciriq qolit ru, qolit ga, ,老鼠啊 (qolit baqun mu.) uya, si lux rangay ga, qolit qaca ya, musa smi tquting ga ciriq yapit ro ciriq nanu qhniq nanu ga, 對, qaca niqun myan, (cyunga maki rgyax maki tnngarux ku?) 很多啊 (piyux ga?) tngarux, maki qabax, 猴子ga, qaca niqun myan ro. .
S.PHON: == mwani mis~ɕuw qalaŋ ru ʦ~ʨjux te inu ******* == qalaŋ s~ɕqojaw maki kja puʦ~ʨiŋ s~ɕkura βjaqan waɣi ro s~ɕkura ħrħul ʦ~ʨqa rɣjax βʔβu mlalin, mtama kja rɣjax pinjen s~ɕkura βjaqan waɣi ro s~ɕkura ħrħul, s~ɕkura βjaqan waɣi ɣa ks~ɕoβiħ ki βawiq lljuŋ tmali na ħβun lljuŋ s~ɕqeran ro lljuŋ qjawan. s~ɕkura ħtɣan waɣi qalaŋ naħa ɣa maki qara rjaniq ɣiraŋ nqa rjaniq pepuħenkwan ħnas~ɕun nja. qalaŋ qani ɣa ʦ~ʨβalaj tjaβa na qalaŋ maki rjaniq qani. s~ɕkaħul qalaŋ s~ɕqojaw ɣmlux rjaniq s~ɕkura kja ħrħul ɣa βaq tħeħok qalaŋ s~ɕlamaw, ro s~ɕkura kja tʔltu lɣa βaq teħok qmajaħ uriŋ. . s~ɕinllwan lalu qalaŋ **** lalu qalaŋ s~ɕqojaw qani ɣa maki s~ɕajiŋ pinqjuwan, te qutux ɣa maki rjax klħaŋan ipun ɣa s~ɕan naħa s~ɕqojaw qa ʦ~ʨquliq ipun, imi nja ɣa "pqas~ɕan na rjaniq", te s~ɕajiŋ ɣa lalu s~ɕqojaw qani imi nja ɣa pijux rruma ma. "s~ɕqojaw",**"****",***s~ɕqojaw*********. pinqzjuwan qalaŋ **** pinqjuwan maħa puqiŋ mrħow naħa ɣa knaħul pins~ɕβkan qalaŋ ms~ɕtβwan. ********pins~ɕβkan . tajal ka njux qalaŋ s~ɕqojaw mis~ɕuw qanij **** qalaŋ s~ɕqojaw maɣan kβħul mqes~ɕu pɣan maɣan qaβax ʦ~ʨquliq naħa, ro ħβku s~ɕki mpux pajat kawas~ɕ na laqi mrkjas~ɕ ɣa qutux kβħul qaβax ʦ~ʨquliq ɣa maki akja mpux mtuju ʦ~ʨquliq nja, ro mpux maɣan mpux maɣan kawas~ɕ na klokaħ ħaji na ʦ~ʨquliq ɣa qutux kβħul qaβax ʦ~ʨquliq ɣa maki miman maɣan ʦ~ʨquliq nja, ro miman maɣan kawas~ɕ na jutas~ɕ jaki, qutux kβħul qaβax ʦ~ʨquliq ɣa maki mpus~ɕal qes~ɕu ʦ~ʨquliq nja. ro tajux kaħul ʦ~ʨqenu minrok naħa ħija ɣa, ʦ~ʨquliq tajal qutux kβħul qaβax ʦ~ʨquliq ɣa maki mqes~ɕu pɣan qutux ʦ~ʨquliq nja, ro βinaħ lɣa ʦ~ʨquliq βinaħ minrok la. qalaŋ s~ɕqojaw ħija ɣa s~ɕnħjan naħa utux tajal, ro maki ɣaɣa ʦ~ʨmjus~ɕ uji. s~ɕnħe naħa maħa βaq maraj mβlaq na qnxan ro kmloħ, mwani ɣa maki ʦ~ʨikaj ʦ~ʨquliq mus~ɕa tens~ɕinkjo ini ɣa kiris~ɕto kjokaj, maki uji ʦ~ʨquliq s~ɕnħe utux kaħat. ʦ~ʨpijaŋ jaw tnpila: qalaŋ s~ɕqojaw ħija ʦ~ʨpjaŋa mrwa kβlaj qeqaja ini ɣa mqupaħ, maki uji ʦ~ʨquliq njan mawaħ ββes~ɕan, ro pinqumaħ ħija ɣa ana oʦ~ʨja, paɣaj, ro βwaj qħoniq, kβalaj na qeqaja ħija ɣa, ana patas~ɕ qħoniq, tminun na ruma, βinaħ lɣa wal ħeʦ~ʨi mtijaw ini ɣa mqwas~ɕ la. ,**. tuqij **** ɣmlux ɣlɣan: s~ɕkaħul aki lutuŋ ɣmlux βas~ɕu ro s~ɕkura qalaŋ s~ɕlamaw, pβijaq ʦ~ʨqa qalaŋ s~ɕqojaw. qmujit ɣlɣan: pβijaq βjaqan qara rjaniq ɣiraŋ s~ɕki tajħuk, ro mʦ~ʨʔuβuj rjaniq s~ɕjentaw *** ro rjaniq s~ɕeŋtaw * s~ɕki ɣiraŋ, s~ɕkura ɣlax rjaniq s~ɕeŋtaw *, ro s~ɕi s~ɕħoju mus~ɕa lro teħok s~ɕu la. **: . kiʔan pklaħaŋ βinħeʦ~ʨi ***** qalaŋ s~ɕqojaw ħija ɣa βaħa ħmʦ~ʨwa kħmaj ʦ~ʨijan ʦ~ʨquliq naħa la, miʦ~ʨa qa knalaj naħa kiʔan pklaħaŋ βnħeʦ~ʨi naħa, ro s~ɕoβiħ na qalaŋ s~ɕlamaw ħija ɣa maki mβlaq na ps~ɕβaqan ro βjoiŋ pħɣup. pinʦ~ʨrux uji pqwas~ɕan βiru ro βjoiŋ, mus~ɕa mkrax kinmxan ʦ~ʨquliq ro ps~ɕβaq llaqi. qalaŋ s~ɕqojaw qani ɣa qalaŋ tajal, kruma ʦ~ʨquliq naħa kmajal ke tajal uji, ks~ɕoβiħ kawas~ɕ mwani ɣa njan kβlaj jaw na qalaŋ qa naħa, us~ɕ ɣa ʦ~ʨipak ħaji kβlaj jaw na ʦ~ʨjuŋa, βaħa ħmʦ~ʨwa ʦ~ʨjuŋa ɣa uka ʦ~ʨquliq mus~ɕa qmujij ke tajal ro mwani lɣa məŋjut mnukil qaβax βnħeʦ~ʨi naħa la, miʦ~ʨa qa uka uji ʦ~ʨquliq s~ɕniβil ɣaɣa tajal la. . ʦ~ʨipak kinβaqan na ɣaɣa pajas~ɕ temu**** : (s~ɕiŋa ɣa maki nanu ɣaɣa ita ʔtajal), te s~ɕiŋa maki nanu aj s~ɕiliq s~ɕiliq (s~ɕiliq ɣa?) s~ɕiliq ɣa* (βaqun mu, qβħniq ʦ~ʨa?) aw, ro βaq pħŋijaŋ ʦ~ʨjux nja qwas~ɕ nja aj, s~ɕmaju ini ħmʦ~ʨi, (mus~ɕa ta qmalup ɣa mita s~ɕiliq ɣa?) aw aj (ħan*ro kajal ʦ~ʨikaj s~ɕraral ɣa ijat maki uji ms~ɕpi), ms~ɕpi ms~ɕpi imi nja. s~ɕrma s~ɕrma ɣa jaqiħ ɣa jaqiħ ɣa βlaq ɣa βlaq s~ɕpi, (ħan. ro ʦ~ʨjuŋa ɣa nanu keʔ lalu tajal qeqaja qani) ikus~ɕ, (ikus~ɕ ɣa?) ʦ~ʨinun tokan ɣa ʦ~ʨinun tokan ɣa (ro qani ɣa nanu lalu tajal nja) nuka. nuka ɣa (s~ɕon nanu kβalaj nuka qani kaħul nanu kʔman?) kʔman kɣij ɣa kɣij. kɣi ɣa nja qa qβaq ɣa (ro maki lalu qani?) ikus~ɕ (ikus~ɕ uji ɣa?) ʦ~ʨinun wakil, (ʦ~ʨinun wakil ɣa ini ptnaq s~ɕajiŋ ni?) ini ħaji tminun tokan ħija. (ħan ro qani ɣa?) wakil, (tminun wakil ɣa?) aw ħan βaqun mu la. (ro ʦ~ʨjuŋa ɣa maki nanu iro nja qani? maki lalu tajal? plquj ɣa?) plquj mtalaħ mqalux, maki uji, (ro s~ɕraral ɣa maki nanu tminun ɣa maki nanu ɣaɣa tminun ɣa maki ɣaɣa nja?) uŋat aj mlikuj ɣa ʦ~ʨjux nanaq mlikuj kreril ini triŋ qeqaja mlikuj kneril ja (ħan mlikuj ɣa) ini triŋ qeqaja naħa , katun ta βzjok mus~ɕa ta mlata (ro qani ɣa nanu lalu tajal qani?) kʔɣa, kʔɣa aw (ħan, s~ɕjun nanu qani?) s~ɕjan ni naɣaw, ana ħmut mnaɣaw qani, mus~ɕa ta rɣjax, mamu ta nas~ɕi ro nanu (ʦ~ʨjuŋa ɣa maki la?) (maki qani la?) uka tminun lru (βaq s~ɕu tminun uji?) βaq ku aj tokan ru wakil ru kari, kari ikaw ħija kari kraħu ɣa ʦ~ʨjux kja pi ħija (ħan pijux uji qaja ħaw) kβalaj qutux (ħan* nanu qani?) kʔɣa kʔɣa qani ɣa (pis~ɕa rjax? kβalaj qutux qani ɣa aki pis~ɕa rjax? ika ɣek?) iraŋ iŋat βalaj. nwaħ qmajaħ ʦ~ʨikaj ro wal mro ʦ~ʨikaj, mus~ɕa qmajaħ laro waħan mu mrwa ʦ~ʨikaj (ro pquju ʦ~ʨikaj jaw s~ɕu s~ɕiŋa, qnxan s~ɕu s~ɕiŋa ɣa, maki qalaŋ s~ɕlamaw qani) ɣipun maki ɣipun na ro s~ɕeniŋ ku βalaj na zju ɣo s~ɕaj ɣa s~ɕanka ku s~ɕeniŋ tajal la(ħtɣan s~ɕu s~ɕqani) qalaŋ kjaħu mus~ɕa ms~ɕħzi s~ɕqani ro laqi ʦ~ʨja kjaħu (kjaħu uji ɣa? ħan, maki lalu ʦ~ʨa?) s~ɕlamaw, (s~ɕlamaw ɣa ro ħani ɣa s~ɕlamaw uji?) aw ru(s~ɕiŋa ɣa lalu s~ɕlamaw ɣa raka ɣa?) raka raka ɣa ħas~ɕis~ɕjo (ħas~ɕis~ɕjo ɣa?) lalu nja. *******, **, (ʦ~ʨeħuj ɣa?) s~ɕeħuj ɣa **ɣa ro **, (ro maki rɣjax ɣa maki nanu kʔman tħujaj maniq?) , kʔman ɣa jaħux niqun ta ro, (jaħux ɣa maki jaħux tumaw ro?) jaħux tumaw, jaħux βalaj ,(jaħux******?) jaħux tumaw, jaħux βalaj ** (maki jaħux tajal?) jaħux tajal ɣa, uja jaħux tajal ɣa **tjaβa qaʦ~ʨa ja, jaħux tumaw ɣa ***, **ro (*jaħux tajal*?) *jaħux tajal*,*****,jaħux tumaw ro qutux kinlβaŋ s~ɕon naħa ɣa, ħlβaŋ qutux loji tjaβa loji ɣa, tjuɣan qa niqun tajal jaħux ɣa. jaħux (ʦ~ʨjuŋa ɣariŋ s~ɕu mwaħ ʦ~ʨani ɣa, njan pnʦ~ʨiriq ki βinaħ qalaŋ, qalaŋ s~ɕkikun?) pnʦ~ʨiriq ɣa mtuʦ~ʨiŋ ɣa mtuʦ~ʨiŋ nanaq ro, (ħan nanaq ʦ~ʨquliq ki ʦ~ʨquliq ɣa?) uja ɣa, ʦ~ʨquliq ʦ~ʨquliq ita nanaq mtuʦ~ʨiŋ, (ijat qaβax qalaŋ ro?) ijat, ***maki **s~ɕu maki **mu ɣa, mwaħ prax uji, mroq maħa ʦ~ʨqani ro, (ħan, ro ʦ~ʨjuŋa ɣa mulu ʦ~ʨimu inu pila?) uka pila ɣa, (uka pila ʦ~ʨjuŋa?) uka pila, ini ʦ~ʨami qβaq maniq nanu aj, ana s~ɕjam ini ʦ~ʨami qβaq maniq, uka niqun nanu la likuj βaq mus~ɕa ʦ~ʨiriq qolit ru, qolit ɣa, ,*** (qolit βaqun mu.) uja, s~ɕi lux raŋaj ɣa, qolit qaʦ~ʨa ja, mus~ɕa s~ɕmi tqutiŋ ɣa ʦ~ʨiriq japit ro ʦ~ʨiriq nanu qħniq nanu ɣa, *, qaʦ~ʨa niqun mjan, (ʦ~ʨjuŋa maki rɣjax maki tnŋarux ku?) *** (pijux ɣa?) tŋarux, maki qaβax, **ɣa, qaʦ~ʨa niqun mjan ro. .
